title: Bench-sync decision: three diverging copies of the bench (Harness/Portfolio/Curriculums)
description: The fleet inventory (docs/flota-de-agentes.md, operator-local) found the 5-agent bench + harness-status + hooks copied into Portfolio and Curriculums with no sync mechanism. Produce a recommendation with trade-offs: (a) re-transplant via migrate_project.py on each generation bump, (b) deliberate per-project divergence, (c) a sync manifest. Recommendation only; no code.
